case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF VS. PATRICIA ANNA HENDERSON HOSKINS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-01-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY RODERICK SHEHEE-SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2014 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,498.00 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF AS TO DEFENDANT HOSKINS, PATRICIA ANNA HENDERSON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.99) SERVED AUG-20-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HOSKINS, PATRICIA ANNA HENDERSON

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOSKINS, PATRICIA ANNA HENDERSON $3,498.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,528.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
